title: Intravenously Delivered Lipid Nanoparticles Access Acute Spinal Cord Injury via Disrupted Vasculature.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Trauma to the spinal cord disrupts the blood-spinal cord barrier and triggers a secondary injury cascade characterized by inflammation and progressive neuronal and glial cell death. Therapeutic cytokines and growth factors have shown promise as a treatment in preclinical studies, though their clinical translation is limited by short protein half-lives and t...
importanceSignals: priority topic: gene therapy, translational medicine
